meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to implement advanced project management workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance business fast.
content.answer_block: Break the 'basic app' cycle by implementing a modular project management architecture. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous refactoring, you transform static builds into scalable SaaS ecosystems. This approach shifts your focus from manual coding to high-level architectural orchestration, significantly increasing your delivery velocity.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: three months into a freelance project, the codebase has morphed into a monolithic mess, and the client is asking for features that feel impossible to bolt onto your fragile foundation. You’re stuck in the 'basic app' trap—churning out high-effort, low-margin products that don't scale. It’s the silent killer of freelance growth.

But the landscape has shifted. By adopting an AI-first project management methodology, you stop being a code-monkey and start acting as a Lead Architect. We are going to use Antigravity to define our domain models and Claude Code to execute the implementation, turning your dev workflow into a high-octane production line.

steps.title: Define Domain Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, map your business logic into a structured schema to avoid technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Architect. Create a modular schema for a project management SaaS including entities for Workspaces, Tasks, and User Roles with strict relational constraints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate the Prisma schema based on the Antigravity architecture output.'

steps.title: Bootstrap Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold the boilerplate, ensuring a production-ready environment from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14 project with Tailwind, Shadcn/UI, and server-side authentication using the schema defined in step 1.

steps.title: Implement Autonomous Feature Loops
steps.description: Delegate repetitive CRUD boilerplate to Claude Code, allowing you to focus on complex business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define the API route requirements for task management, including optimistic UI updates and validation logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the task creation API route with Zod validation and optimistic updates.'

steps.title: Integrate State Synchronization
steps.description: Ensure your project management dashboard stays in sync with real-time database updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a real-time subscription hook for task updates using TanStack Query.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a custom hook useTasks that implements real-time sync with the database.'

steps.title: Automated Quality Gateways
steps.description: Set up an automated testing suite that validates your core business logic every time you commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Playwright tests for the core task management flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Write unit tests for task status transitions and integration tests for the dashboard view.'

pro_tips: Always define your database schema in Antigravity before touching a single line of code; it prevents 90% of refactoring headaches.
Use Claude Code to write 'negative test cases'—force it to try and break your API routes to uncover edge-case bugs.
Treat your prompts as documentation; keep a versioned library of your Antigravity prompts to reuse across different client projects.
Never accept the first output from Claude; use the 'refine' command to force more modular, decoupled code patterns.
Inject your own architectural constraints into the Antigravity system prompt to ensure every output matches your personal coding style.
content.next_steps: Now that you have a scalable project management foundation, deploy your MVP to Vercel and integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate your deployment cycle.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start mastering them. Our community gives you the exact prompts, workflows, and peer support to ship faster than you ever thought possible. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
